benefits.description: Lost 72 lbs in 3 months (from 380 to 308 lbs); sustained appetite suppression
Significant appetite suppression allowing healthy meal choices; unable to consume more than a bite or two of sugary foods
Feels better than ever; more present with children; easier to be around in general
Taste buds changed drastically; now able to tolerate and enjoy spicy foods when previously could not

side_effects.description: Weight fluctuates up 1-2 lbs during menstrual cycle
Hair loss occurring due to rapid weight loss

protocol_notes: Started November 1st at starting weight 380 lbs. Titrated from 2.5 mg for 7 weeks, then increased to 5 mg in late December and maintained at 5 mg through report date (February 21st). Currently weight 308 lbs, goal weight 200 lbs. Reports zero side effects from medication itself.
